title: nodejs:22 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
nodejs
[1:22.22.0-1]
- Update to 22.22.0
  Resolves: RHEL-141879

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883

[2.0.20-2]
- Patch bundled glob-parent
- Resolves: CVE-2021-35065

[2.0.20-1]
- Rebase to 2.0.20
  Resolves: CVE-2022-3517

[2.0.15-1]
- Resolves: RHBZ#2005419
- Resolves CVE-2020-28469
- Rebase to newest version
- Change source to npmjs.com

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
full_text:
nodejs
[1:22.22.0-1]
- Update to 22.22.0
  Resolves: RHEL-141879

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883

[2.0.20-2]
- Patch bundled glob-parent
- Resolves: CVE-2021-35065

[2.0.20-1]
- Rebase to 2.0.20
  Resolves: CVE-2022-3517

[2.0.15-1]
- Resolves: RHBZ#2005419
- Resolves CVE-2020-28469
- Rebase to newest version
- Change source to npmjs.com

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
